subcodes.first_line: The Book of the All-Merciful speaketh amidst the religions and summoneth the parties unto their Lord, the Most Compassionate. Blessed is the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الرحمن ینطق بین الادیان و یدعو الاحزاب الی ربهم الرحمن طوبی لقلب
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
